channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FanDuel parent’s stock tumbles as the house just can’t seem to win for its investors
item.description: Shares of FanDuel’s parent were pointing down after disappointing earnings. Its users lost too many bets and left for competitors.

item.title: Is it OK to wear pajamas on your next flight? A viral post sparks debate.
item.description: Tampa International Airport issued a mock ban on sleepwear. Plenty of comments soon followed.

item.title: Wholesale prices rise sharply and point to persistent inflation
item.description: The cost of wholesale goods and services rose at an accelerated pace in January for the second month in a row, suggesting persistent inflation could d...

item.title: His lawyer said, ‘He’s gone off the deep end.’ My brother is paranoid and forgot he sold his house. What can I do?
item.description: “My sister and I are his only family, the will is made and we would inherit his estate.”

item.title: Nine out of 10 bets this fund manager made over the past year have outperformed. These are his next two plays.
item.description: Gold miners, Japan stocks and nuclear plays boosted Man Group’s portfolio

item.title: UBS downgrades the U.S. stock market. Here's what has the investment bank worried
item.description: UBS downgraded U.S. equities to benchmark in a fully invested global equity portfolio, saying factors that powered years of outperformance are startin...

item.title: UBS turns bullish on Palantir, says buy the dip on this clear AI winner
item.description: UBS sees shares of Palantir rallying 23% from here.

item.title: TD Cowen turns bullish on Southwest Air as passenger demand strengthens
item.description: TD Cowen sees shares of Dallas-based Southwest rallying 30% from current levels.

item.title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Netflix, Dell, Honeywell, Block, Palantir, Live Nation & more
item.description: Here are Friday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

item.title: Trump Media in talks to spin off Truth Social from DJT into independent stock
item.description: Trump Media said it was considering separating Truth Social into a separate, publicly traded company.

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...
